summary: Fails shortlist readiness. The manuscript sustains strong scene pressure and keeps canonical past-tense narration across chapters, but unresolved HIGH continuity breaks around Tomas Vega's chronology and repeated cross-chapter prose scaffolds/tics undercut Booker-level coherence and control.

findings.problem: Seasonal continuity contradiction: chapter_04 is in the continuity sheet's late-autumn block (chapters 01-05), but the narration references 'spring training news,' which breaks the timeline's seasonal track.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the opening beat at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1046-1050 so the radio/sports detail is late-autumn plausible (offseason trade talk, winter meetings, or postseason recap) while preserving the same ambient texture and pressure entering conservation spaces.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1048 no longer references spring training and the replacement cue is seasonally plausible for late autumn; fail if out-of-season baseball timing remains.

findings.problem: Chapter-level chronology conflicts with later chapters: this chapter presents June 12 as the vigil-card death date and treats it as settled, but later certified-record chapters pivot to a November 1992 frame without reconciling the date architecture.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1529-1541 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:1569-1573, rewrite the June material as one contested narrative layer (or a separate march-date layer) rather than definitive death-date fact, and explicitly mark uncertainty so later November records can coexist causally.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised chapter distinguishes June narrative artifacts from unresolved actual death-date fact at the cited spans; fail if June 12 is still asserted as the settled death date without qualification.

findings.problem: Cross-chapter contradiction in investigatory logic: chapter_11 says family has said November 1992 for years, which clashes with chapter_05's established June memorial-date narrative unless the shift is explicitly explained.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3828-3834 (and supporting context near snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4009 if needed) so Marisol names the conflicting prior dates and explains why she is searching the October-December window now.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the chapter explicitly acknowledges multiple inherited dates and justifies the selected archive search range in the cited span; fail if it still frames November-only family memory as uncontested fact.

findings.problem: Hard factual mismatch with prior certified records: chapter_12 states death date/year as November 18, 1997, conflicting with chapter_11's certified record readout (November 12, 1992).
findings.rewrite_direction: Correct certificate detail at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4128-4135 so date/year align with the established chapter_11 certified record; preserve confrontation dynamics while removing the contradictory year/date payload.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if chapter_12 certificate date/year at the cited span matches chapter_11's certified record facts and no alternate year/date contradiction remains in chapter_12; fail if 1997 or any conflicting certificate date persists.

findings.problem: Cross-chapter style consistency drift: this chapter repeats the same 'By the time Marisol...' commuter-weather entry scaffold used repeatedly elsewhere, flattening chapter texture and violating prose_style_profile chapter-variance intent.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3270-3274 to open inside immediate suspension machinery (security block, conference-room preamble, or document handoff) instead of transit recap; keep rent/stipend pressure but move it after scene ignition.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the first paragraph no longer uses a 'By the time' transit-weather launch and establishes suspension conflict within the opening lines; fail if the chapter still starts with the same commuter template.

findings.problem: Adjacent-chapter cadence repetition: chapter_11 reuses the same transit-weather 'By the time...' opening skeleton, reducing rhythmic distinction from chapters around it.

findings.problem: Third consecutive structural repeat: chapter_12 again opens with a transit-weather 'By the time...' lead-in, creating serial chapter-entry sameness instead of texture variance.
